notes: This run adds hardware-only fio-default 8- and 16-worker random read/write measurements.
The shard-aware write series was introduced in later commit 3c10db4 and is not present in this run.
ext4/lvm-raid10, xfs/lvm-raid10, and zfs/mirror-8k measured idle p99 latency above under-load p99 latency; results are retained as observed.
ext4/lvm-raid10 and ext4/md-raid6 reported data_intact=false after block-level corruption; non-checksumming layouts can flap with read-balancing luck, so the observed verdicts are retained.
